meta.title: Account Security
meta.description: Manage your Daily Page password and two-factor authentication.

accountSecurity.heading: Account Security
accountSecurity.subheading: Keep your account protected with a strong password and an authenticator app.

password.title: Change Password
password.description: Use a unique password with at least 8 characters.

twoFactor.title: Two-Factor Authentication
twoFactor.description: Add a one-time code from an authenticator app after your password when you log in.

feedback.setupReady: Scan the QR code, then enter the 6-digit code to finish setup.
feedback.missingFields: Please fill in all required fields.
feedback.missingCurrentPassword: Enter your current password to continue.
feedback.passwordTooShort: Your new password must be at least 8 characters.
feedback.invalidCurrentPassword: The current password did not match.
feedback.missingCode: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app.
feedback.invalidCode: That code did not work. Please try again.
feedback.noPendingSetup: Start setup again before entering a code.
feedback.setupExpired: That setup session expired. Start setup again to get a fresh QR code.
feedback.twoFactorNotEnabled: Two-factor authentication is not enabled for this account.
feedback.genericError: Something went wrong. Please try again.
feedback.unexpectedError: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
